name: Control App Roommate
description:
You recently saw an ad while scrolling through Youtube about a new app that lets you control people. Obviously it seemed totally bogus, but the app had no reviews or no downloads. All you hoped was that it wasn’t a virus… (tags: hyper, growth, muscle growth, muscular)
